did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a data article describing the creation and release of a manually annotated histopathology dataset for non-melanoma skin cancer. The results (the dataset itself) were obtained through manual annotation by a pathologist/histopathology scientist using ImageJ, not through AI/ML methods. While the paper mentions that the data is intended for training machine learning models and references related AI work, this specific paper does not use AI to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
